name: agent-planner
description: AgentPlanner MCP server — BDI-aligned tool surface for agentic planning, decisions, and knowledge.
long_description: Connect Claude to AgentPlanner with a focused 15-tool surface organized by Belief / Desire / Intention namespaces. Built for Cowork live artifacts, Claude Code sessions, and OpenClaw multi-agent VMs. Each tool answers one whole agentic question and returns an `as_of` timestamp. v0.9.0 is a clean break from the legacy 63-tool CRUD surface — see MIGRATION_v0.9.md.

api_token.title: API Token
api_token.description: Personal API token from AgentPlanner. Generate one at https://agentplanner.io under Settings → API Tokens.

api_url.title: API URL
api_url.description: AgentPlanner API base URL. Use https://agentplanner.io/api for the hosted service or http://localhost:3000 for local development.
